title: Bonsai Pots
description: Turns all potted saplings into neatly-trimmed bonsai plants!
body: Bonsai Pots is a resource pack that overhauls all potted plants in Minecraft, converting each into a neatly-trimmed 3D Bonsai tree. All saplings represent their respective trees, while flowers were given all-new unique tree designs, ranging from cherry blossoms to willow trees. The pack is fairly lightweight and modular, and I encourage anyone to make their own improvements if they'd like.
